name: Connol
description_en: Connol was the husband of Felicia and the father of Violet and Powder. Much like his wife, he worked in the mines and was implied to be a supporter of Vander's and Silco's initiative to improve the lives of their people and liberate Zaun from Piltover 's control. He and his wife were ultimately killed during a botched uprising against Piltover, leaving Vander to adopt their two daughters as his own.
description_fr: Connol était le mari de Felicia et le père de Violet et Powder. Tout comme sa femme, il travaillait dans les mines et était impliqué dans l'initiative de Vander et Silco visant à améliorer la vie de leur peuple et à libérer Zaun du contrôle de Piltover. Lui et sa femme ont finalement été tués lors d'un soulèvement bâclé contre Piltover, laissant Vander adopter leurs deux filles comme siennes.
